title: Exotic Minerals
body: Exotic Minerals is a Minecraft mod that allows players to explore six unique ores: Ruby, Bauxite, Uranium, Titanium, Mythril, and Enderite. These minerals offer unique crafting opportunities, such as crafting powerful tools, lightweight aluminum, energy-efficient machinery, durable tools, magical equipment, and enchanted gear. Immerse yourself in the world of Exotic Minerals and transform your Minecraft experience.
